# Backup current settings + extensions
./scripts/manage-vscode-transparency.sh backup_settings

# Apply minimal transparency stack (uninstall heavy cosmetic extensions)
./scripts/manage-vscode-transparency.sh apply_minimal

# Preview actions only
DRY_RUN=1 ./scripts/manage-vscode-transparency.sh apply_minimal

# Restore everything from latest backup
./scripts/manage-vscode-transparency.sh revert_backup

# Ensure backed-up extensions are installed
./scripts/manage-vscode-transparency.sh sync_extensions
```
